articles.title: Prabhsimran, Shreyas upstage Rahul's 152 to mow down record IPL chase
articles.description: Batters filled their boots with both teams being sloppy in the field on a flat pitch

articles.title: Ngidi 'stable' after being taken to hospital for head injury
articles.description: DC fast bowler hit his head hard on the ground while attempting to take a catch

articles.title: Samson century, Hosein four-for hand Mumbai Indians their biggest defeat
articles.description: Noor Ahmad also picked up two wickets as MI, chasing 208 were bowled out for just 104 in 19 overs

articles.title: Shanto century, Mustafizur five-for seals series win for Bangladesh
articles.description: Dean Foxcroft's late charge, during which he put up a fifty-run stand with No. 11 Ben Lister, could not get New Zealand over the line

articles.title: 'I just tried to win the game as quickly as I could' - Wolvaardt scorches 53-ball 115
articles.description: Skipper not satisfied with 3-0 series win and wants to chase a five-match sweep against India

articles.title: Jude Bellingham buys minority stake in Hundred franchise Birmingham Phoenix

articles.title: Abhishek's 135* blows Delhi Capitals away

articles.title: Fakhar Zaman century gives Qalandars crucial win
